title: Phosphor Ore
description: This mod add new ore and tools.This mod works in both your singleplayer worlds and your multiplayer worlds.
body:
CurseForge link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/phosphor-ore

This mod adds phosphorus mine and items. A different type of zombie is also available in the mode.This mod works in both your singleplayer worlds and your multiplayer world.

Thanks for 41 downloads!

Inside the mod:

Phosphorus Ingot

Phosphorus Tools(axe,hoe etc.)

Phosphorus Armors

Phosphorus Ore

Phosphored Zombie

Recipes(Firework Rocket etc.)
